prompt: A low-angle, wide-angle dynamic action selfie of a young woman with long wavy blonde hair running through shallow ocean waves on a bright sunny beach. She is wearing a white cropped t-shirt, white shorts, yellow tinted sunglasses, and bright yellow clogs. She is looking directly at the camera, holding it out with one arm stretched toward the foreground to capture the selfie perspective. A high-speed splash of crystal-clear ocean water dramatically frames the entire shot in a circular arc effect, with sharp, detailed water droplets and spray frozen in mid-air. Clear blue sky and a distant coastline with buildings and green hills are visible in the background. Hyper-realistic texture, vivid colors, natural sunlight, cinematic crisp focus, 8k resolution.
